---
title: "Stranger Things 5: The Finale"
description: "⭐⭐ 1/2"
date: "1/1/2026"
image: "strangerthings5.jpg"
categories: ["⭐⭐ 1/2"]
---

They could’ve done so much better. High rating because I love the show and still enjoyed this final season, regardless. But, man, I thought they had more to give. I also have a shit ton of questions.
Anyways, I’m sad that this is it after ten years! I definitely cried a few times. One of my favorites with the fam and it’ll always be a classic. 🥲
